title.simpleText: Cantores Hermanos del Sto. Nino Male Choir-Butuan

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Cantores Hermanos del Sto. Nino Male Choir-Butuan
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Cantores Hermanos del Sto. Niño Choir – Butuan City
Serving the Church through sacred music since 1999.

We are an all-male choir rendering Catholic liturgical and devotional songs. Please like and subscribe for more faith-filled music.

This channel also serves as our official rehearsal and reference platform for both new and current members.

Regular Service Schedule:
• Sunday – 10:00 AM, Sto. Niño Diocesan Shrine, Libertad, Butuan City
• Friday – 6:00 PM, Devotion to Señor Sto. Niño
• 1st Sunday – 9:00 AM, Robinsons Butuan

Thank you for supporting our ministry. 🙏
